name: personal-hooks
description: OpenClaw Continuity is a time-aware continuity and follow-up skill package with /new carryover, staged memory, tracked events, natural-language setting changes, and structured writeback.
author: OpenClaw Continuity Maintainers

envVars.name: OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR
envVars.description: Required path to the dedicated OpenClaw state directory used by this skill for continuity state.

envVars.name: OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH
envVars.description: Required path to the OpenClaw config file used for setup validation.
